methodology: Weighted fixture score = fdr_avg (5-GW window) + 0.3 penalty for away venue on next fixture. Lower score = easier run. Fixture rank 1 = best (easiest).

fixture_ratings.verdict: BEST RUN — joint-easiest home fixture in GW38 plus the softest 5-GW average of all assets.
EXCELLENT — home FDR 2 in GW38, 2.4 average across 5 GWs.
GOOD — home FDR 2 in GW38, solid 2.5 5-GW average. Budget-friendly differential.
NEUTRAL — home fixture but FDR 3; fitness doubt is the bigger risk.
AVOID — away FDR 3 in GW38 plus 2.8 5-GW average.
WORST RUN — away FDR 3 in GW38 and highest 5-GW average. Form/ownership high but fixtures unsupportive of captaincy.

summary: GW38 fixture picture is clean — no DGWs or BGWs. Easiest runs: BRE (Mbeumo, 2.2) and MCI (Haaland, 2.4), both home FDR 2. LIV (Salah) has the hardest run: FDR-3 away.
